name: Prince Dripp Freedrick-Wulf

sheet.name: Prince Dripp Freedrick-Wulf
sheet.background_story:
Loyal to the Kingdom of Covington. Dripp answered the call of the Serpent, and participated in the Battle of the Church. 

As one of the survivors, Dripp stayed at the Bulwark, relishing in the spoils of his victory.

After news of his brother Donte's death reached him, Dripp left the Bulwark, venturing into the Burrows. 

The Brightlord urged Dripp to reconsider, but Dripp was stubborn.

Dripp, once a Serpent supporter, now seeks to destroy whatever evil killed his brother.

description:
Loyal to the Kingdom of Covington. Dripp answered the call of the Serpent, and participated in the Battle of the Church. 

As one of the survivors, Dripp stayed at the Bulwark, relishing in the spoils of his victory.

After news of his brother Donte's death reached him, Dripp left the Bulwark, venturing into the Burrows. 

The Brightlord urged Dripp to reconsider, but Dripp was stubborn.

Dripp, once a Serpent supporter, now seeks to destroy whatever evil killed his brother.
